text.title: xUnit Testing Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: skip-this-methodology — use Playwright / k6 across deployed services
unit tests with Mock<T>; constructor injection; FluentAssertions on collections

branch.question: Do you need the real DI graph + middleware?

conclusion.verdict: unit-test the controller with Mock service + per-branch Theory/Fact
Testcontainers Postgres via IAsyncLifetime + ICollectionFixture + Respawn for reset

text.example: layer=service_or_validator → constructor-injection → Mock<IInvoiceRepository> + per-branch Facts/Theories + FluentAssertions.
